results.title: Samsudeen B - Sr Development Manager - Telstra Health CloudMed | LinkedIn
results.snippet: For healthcare organizations to fully realize the cost savings and quality improvement goals of #VBC, they must be able to do the following: • Utilize a data-driven digital infrastructure that supports a multi-stakeholder "network of networks," which includes different payment capabilities. • Attain data interoperability to facilitate permissioned data-sharing. • Build longitudinal healthcare records that patients can supplement with their personal data. • Draw insights from patient data and external data sets to guide clinical decision-making.
